skills.name: shilajit-price-comparison
skills.description: Independent shilajit supplement price comparison tool. Covers 80+ products across 40+ brands with lab-verified COA data, fulvic acid percentages, tier rankings (S/A/B/C/D), and price-per-gram calculations. All featured products have third-party certificates of analysis.

skills.name: shilajit-lab-data
skills.description: Lab test data and certificate of analysis information for shilajit supplement brands including fulvic acid content, heavy metals testing, and COA verification status.

skills.name: shilajit-brand-comparison
skills.description: Side-by-side brand comparison tool for shilajit supplements. Compare sourcing, lab testing, fulvic acid content, price, and certifications across multiple brands.
